02 — About

Built on curiosity, fueled by fire.

Hey, I'm Nashon — podcaster, digital creator, and AI obsessive on a mission to make creation easier, faster, and a hell of a lot more fun.

I started the Nashon Fire Podcast because the AI conversation is too important to leave to corporate fluff. We talk real tools, real workflows, real stories — the kind of stuff that actually moves the needle for creators and small business owners.

Whether you found me through the podcast, Instagram, or Facebook — welcome to the fire. 🔥
